guide_sub: Learn Vietnamese Dong — flip cards & security features
slide_1_desc: Don’t let currency math ruin your experience. Scan Vietnamese notes instantly and stop worrying about being scammed.
slide_2_desc: Avoid getting overcharged. Track your spending dynamically with real-time conversion between your home currency and VND.
slide_3_desc: Tell us your budget, time, and destinations. Our AI will craft the perfect daily schedule for your trip across Vietnam.
about_vision_desc: VietMoney was born to help international travelers experience Vietnam to the fullest — without currency barriers, fear of tourist traps, or confusion with unfamiliar bills.
feature_ai_desc: Recognize VND bills instantly with camera.
feature_budget_desc: Track daily spend, set limits, get alerts.
feature_plan_desc: Smart itinerary, suggests spots, estimates cost.
